summary: Login fix verification complete - seeded admin account (admin@digitaltwin.com) now works correctly for both API and UI login flows
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials (admin@digitaltwin.com / ChangeMe!2026) returns 200 with access_token, refresh_token, user, and organization
User email, role (owner), and organization (Platform Admin) are correct
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401 with 'Invalid credentials' error
GET /api/auth/me with valid access_token returns user profile and organization
Frontend login page loads correctly with email, password, and submit button
Frontend login with wrong password shows error toast and stays on /login page
Frontend login with correct credentials successfully redirects to /app/dashboard
Dashboard renders with 'Total Devices' card and sidebar navigation visible
User displayed as 'Platform Administrator' with 'Owner' role in dashboard
Signup page renders correctly with all required fields (Organization name, Full name, Email, Password, Create organization button)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all login and signup UI tests passed)
